products.title: M NOMAD POUCH
products.description: The Nomade Pouch is a practical and versatile creation. Casual, the style is enhanced by M cutout front patch pocket and contrasted stitching for an elegant and effortless look. The spacious interior is equipped with two card slots and closed with a zip closure. Featuring a removable wrist strap, the pouch may be carried by hand or slipped into a bag.
